title: 3D Beds
description: This resource pack gives beds a subtle 3D upgrade with raised pillows and blanket details.
body:
## [![Bisect Hosting](https://i.imgur.com/jZbdTSL.png)](https://bisecthosting.com)

## ![Better Ores 3D](https://i.imgur.com/NvsycEe.png)
## [![Available on CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7671d89a973b0547fda81b5499a6d9902ec2009_0.webp)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/d-beds) [![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/marceuss)
## 3D Beds 🛏️

3D Beds enhances Minecraft's beds with elegant 3D details! The pillow and the top part of the blanket are now slightly raised, adding a touch of depth and realism while preserving the game's classic style. Perfect for players who want cleaner, more polished interiors without overdoing it.

## OptiFine or EMF required!🌿

The resource pack requires mod support to work correctly. You can use [OptiFine](https://www.curseforge.com/linkout?remoteUrl=https://optifine.net/downloads) or [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) if you want to play with [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions)[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium/versions).

**IT WILL NOT WORK PROPERLY WITHOUT THESE MODS AND FEATURES!**
